youtube.title: My Creative Workspace | A Cinematic Desk Setup for Deep Work
youtube.description:
This is where ideas turn into films.

In this video, I walk you through my creative workspace — the desk, lighting, tools, and small details that help me think clearly and create better.

00:00 Intro
00:45 Desk Overview
02:10 Lighting Setup
03:40 Filmmaking Tools

If you enjoy thoughtful and minimal creative content, consider subscribing.
